steps: For 1 L, 3.7% Formaldehyde , add 800 mL, 1X DPBS to a glass beaker on a stir plate. Be sure to work under a ventilated fume hood.
Add 37 g, paraformaldehyde powder to the heated DPBS solution.
Keep stirring until all PFA powder is dissolved. Take care that the solution does not boil to prevent formic acid formation. For better dissolubility of PFA, you can add NaOH -- one drop at the time.
Once all PFA powder is dissolved, adjust the pH to pH 7.4 using HCl.
Add DPBS subsequently until the total volume of 1 L is reached.
Transfer the solution into tubes of the desired proportions and store at -20 °C until use.
creator: Anita Broellochs
